electrical.motor_horsepower: 208/230 V 3 PH, 60 AMPERE or 460 V 3 PH, 30 AMPERE

notes: THIS CONFIGURATION IS MOST OFTEN USED FOR FLEET MAINTENANCE, REPAIR AND SERVICE APPLICATIONS

pages_summary.description: Lift data table and required material list with specifications
pages_summary.extracted_text: LIFT DATA TABLE, MOHAWK RESOURCES, LTD, PARALLELOGRAM LIFT MODEL 38-26-SURFACE, MAXIMUM LOAD CAPACITY (LBS): 38,000 (17236 kg), ANCHOR BOLTS: 3/4 (19), TOTAL NUMBER OF ANCHOR BOLTS: 4, BOLT PATTERN: SEE ANCHOR DETAILS, ANCHOR BOLT SETTING TORQUE: N/A - SEE ANCHOR DETAILS, MINIMUM EMBEDMENT LENGTH (IN.): 8(152) ON GRADE (SEE NOTE 23), MINIMUM CONCRETE THICKNESS (IN.): 6, HYDRAULIC: RESERVOIR CAPACITY 30 GALLONS (114 LITERS), OIL TYPE DEXRON III (ATF), ELECTRICAL: MOTOR HORSEPOWER 208/230 V 3 PH 60 AMPERE or 460 V 3 PH 30 AMPERE, CONTROL CIRCUIT TRANSFORMER 1000 VA, DC VDC POWER SUPPLY 7.7 AMP, 24 VDC POWER SUPPLY 4.8 AMP, SHOP AIR: AIR PRESSURE 85 TO 100 PSI (586 TO 690 Pa), AIR VOLUME- LIFT (LOCKS) 5 CFM (.636 cm³/MIN), AIR VOLUME- OPTIONAL ROLLING JACK (CFM) 25 EACH, AIR VOLUME- OPTIONAL SHOP AIR KIT (CFM) 30, AIR VOLUME- TOTAL REQ'D CAPACITY (CFM) 30 MINIMUM, AIR VOLUME- TOTAL REQ'D CAPACITY (CFM) 50 SUGGESTED, REQUIRED MATERIAL LIST, UNITS = INCH (mm) = POUNDS (kg)

pages_summary.description: General notes with installation requirements and specifications for surface lifts
pages_summary.extracted_text: GENERAL NOTES, SURFACE LIFTS ONLY, UNITS = INCH (mm), NOTE 1: IF AN EXISTING CONCRETE FLOOR HAS A CONCRETE MINIMUM STRENGTH OF NO LESS THAN Fc=4,000 psi (27.6 MPa) AND IS AT LEAST 6 INCHES (152) THICK, THEN THE FLOOR SYSTEM MAY BE USED WITHOUT ALTERATIONS, NOTE 12: IN CERTAIN CASES THE FLOOR SLAB MAY HAVE ADEQUATE STRENGTH TO SUPPORT THE LIFT UNIT BUT MAY NOT BE THICK ENOUGH TO PROVIDE THE MINIMUM EMBEDMENT DEPTH FOR THE AT WEJ-IT ANCHOR BOLTS, NOTE 13: EXCEPT AS DESCRIBED IN NOTE 7, NO EMBEDDED PLUMBING, TUBES, CONDUITS OR OTHER ITEMS, EXCEPT THE LIFT UNIT SERVICE LEG CONDUITS SHALL BE CLOSER THAN 18 INCHES (406) FROM ANY ANCHOR BOLT, NOTE 14: NO ANCHOR BOLT SHALL BE INSTALLED CLOSER THAN 10 INCHES (254) FROM ANY FREE EDGE OR FLOOR JOINT, NOTE 15: PROVIDE TWO, 4 INCH (102) SCH 40 PVC PIPE AS A HYDRAULIC-PNEUMATIC SERVICE SUPPLY CONDUIT RUNNING FROM THE POWER UNIT TO EACH SERVICE LEG, NOTE 16: PROVIDE 4, 1 INCH (25.4) SCH 40 STEEL CONDUITS AS ELECTRICAL SERVICE SUPPLY RUNNING FROM THE POWER UNIT TO THE SERVICE LEGS
